hd008405dg665dg4cb6gad9fg7d5c1ad32a7e: Silvanus willing, we might heal before then.

h065db386gdae5g4884g89fcgd641d3ecd83b: I've canceled the rite. The circle must heal.
h658d12acg4708g4ecbg84adge6663a11c443: But I won't sacrifice our future to the screaming horde. While I still breathe, this grove will not come to harm.

hdba9b7d8g7f79g4baag9ea7g655a288289ce: Halsin's canceled the rite. The brood is exposed. And we've you to thank, Silvanus have pity.
h2496f5cag61fdg45b1g967bg76166c9de154: Enough of the act. I've learned of your alliance with Shadow Druids.
